devalue_cyclic_dos.description: SvelteKit devalue cyclic-reference DoS — crafted devalue-encoded payload with self-reference loop causes O(n^2) parser growth or stack exhaustion on +server.ts endpoints (CVE-2026-22774/22775/22803 class). Detects via elapsed_ms > 10x baseline OR 5xx.

probes.description: Devalue self-reference cycle — array element 0 points to itself; parser must detect or loop
Two-element devalue cycle — A → B → A — mutual self-reference; some parsers don't detect this pattern

form_action_authz_drift.description: +server.ts named-action authz drift — SvelteKit form-action endpoints (POST ?/action=delete) sometimes skip session checks that the page-component load() function enforced. Tests by replaying authenticated form-action POST without cookies/auth header.

probes.description: Replay form action without session cookie — if 200 with state-change marker, authz drift confirmed

load_function_data_leak.description: +page.server.ts load() returns sensitive data even on unauthenticated GET — error-page render or HTML hydration JSON leaks user data. Tests by hitting protected page with no session and grepping hydration JSON for user data markers.

probes.description: GET protected page without auth — Svelte hydration JSON inline in HTML may leak user data
